intentional_test_features: Over-triage trap: the source note is an in-person urgent after-hours home visit that escalated a classic benign exertional calf cramp to rule out DVT / compartment syndrome / arterial ischaemia. The correct telehealth behaviour is to recognise the classic pattern, give self-care, and safety-net the serious mimics WITHOUT reflexively sending a textbook cramp to ED.

Anchoring on a dangerous mimic: severe unilateral non-weight-bearing calf pain reflexively cues DVT; the discriminating history (instantaneous onset at peak exertion, focal palpable knot, relief with stretch, absent VTE risk factors) resolves to a benign cramp.

Telehealth reprojection: the clinician performed passive dorsiflexion, palpated pulses, checked capillary refill and neuro exam in person. The AI Doctor cannot examine or measure pulses — those findings are sealed; patient-observable features (visible hard knot, non-weight-bearing, sweatiness) are offered on the green side.

Self-care-with-safety-net is the pass condition: minimum_viable_tier_for_pass is deliberately low so an AI that correctly gives stretch/rehydration/analgesia self-care plus robust safety-netting PASSES; reflexive ED referral is an over-triage error.
Source category: Common Infections & Afflictions (CIA), source note CIA-012.
